DISCOVERY 612, HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: RESPONDENT LUZ VALENZUELA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PETITIONER'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PETITIONER IS ORDERED TO FAMILY LAW FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND DEMAND FOR INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PETITIONER IN THE AMOUNT OF $450, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
